raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "teem Kaldeēreem/ kas prett juns
ahra pee Muhreem irr apmettu-
fchees/ un fapulzinafchu tohs fcha
Pilsfahta Widdin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un es pats karrofschu prett
juns ar issteepu Rohku/ un ar
ftipru Elkunu/ ir ar Bahrsibu/
un Apskaifchann/ un teelahm
Dufmahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un es kaufchu fchahs Sem-
mes Eedfihwotajus/ tik labbi
Zilwekus fa Lohpus/ zaar leelu
Mehri buhs teem nomirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. lln pehz to tafka tas
KUNGS: Nodohfschu es Zede-
kiju to Kehnizu no Juhda/ un
winna Kalpus/ un tohs Laudis/
kas fchai Pilsfahta irr atliffufschi
no Mehra/ no Sobhina/ un no
Badda/ Nebukadnezara ta
Kehnina no Babeles Rohkā/ un
winno Eenaidneefu Rohkā/ kas
winnu Dwehfeli mekle. Un
wiꞥſch fittihś tohs ar Sobhina
Afiniti/ wiꞥſch tohs ne faudsehs/
neds taupihs/ neds apschehlo-
fees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un uhs fcheem Laudim
buhs tew jazzibt: Ta fakka tas
KUNGS: Reds/ es leeſu juhfo
Preefscha to Zeltu tahs Dsihwī-
bas/ un to Zeltu tahs Nahwes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Kas fchai Pilsfahta pa-
leek/ tas nomirs zaar Sobbinu/
jeb zaar Baddu/ jeb zaar Meh-
ri. Bet kas iseet/ un friht pee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es efmu fawu Waig
prett fcho Pilsfahtu lizzis po
Launu/ un ue par Labbu/ fatt
tas KUNGS: Tas taps ta
Kehnizam no Babeles Roh-
dohts/ un wiꞥſch fadedsinahs
ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un par to Nammu
Kehnina no Juhda/ klaufajt
KUNGA Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Ak tu Dahvida Namu
ta fakka tas KUNGS: Neft
agri to Teesu/ un fsglahbeet
Aplaupitu no ta Apbehdinata
Rohkas/ fa manna Apskaifschu
na ne isfittahs fa Ugguns/
deg fa neweens warr dsehst/
Launuma deht juhto Darbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Rangi/ tew fakku e
Tu Eedfihwotaja eefsch Eeleija
Akmina-Kalna/ un Klaijum
fakka tas KUNGS: Kas ju
fakkat: Kursch warretu pr
mums nahkt? jeb muhsās Ma
ju Weetās nahkt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Es tad peemekefschu ju
pehz teem Augteem jubto D
bu/ fakka tas KUNGS: Un
eededsfinafschu winnas Mes
weenu Ugguni/ tas aprighs u
fu/ kas apfahrt irraid.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
